input.background: Exercise 13.1 presented data on birth weights of infants based on the smoking status of mothers. Table 13.3 lists the data. Descriptive statistics are shown in Table 13.10.
input.question: Conduct an ANOVA on these data. Show all hypothesis-testing steps. Step 4: State the significance level and conclusion.

output.answer: Significance level (optional). The results are significant at $\alpha=0.05$ (reject $H_0$) but are not significant at $\alpha=0.01$ (retain $H_0$).
